basic_details.job_title: HLL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Junior Manager/ Associate Manager Posts
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare (HLL) Junior Manager / Associate Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of HLL Lifecare. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the HLL Recruitment 2026 for various technical, managerial, nursing, and diagnostic roles.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates will be as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc(MLT), PGDMLT, BSc(MLT), DMLT, MBA, MHM, MHA, Medical Dialysis Technology, MSc (Renal Dialysis Technology), BSc (Renal Dialysis Technology), MSc (DT), BSc (DT), Diploma (DT), MSc Critical Care Nursing, MSc Nursing, BSc Nursing
qualification.details: Junior Manager / Associate Manager (QA-LAB): MSc(MLT)/PGDMLT/BSc(MLT)/DMLT Junior Manager / Associate Manager (Business Development - Diagnostic): MBA/MHM/MHA/MSc(MLT)/BSc(MLT)/PGDMLT/DMLT Junior Manager / Associate Manager (QA-Dialysis): Medical Dialysis Technology / MSc (Renal Dialysis Technology) / BSc (Renal Dialysis Technology) Junior Manager / Associate Manager (Cluster Operations - Dialysis): MSc (DT) / MBA (Hospital Management) / MHA / BSc (DT) / Diploma (DT) (2 yrs) MSBTE approved Junior Manager / Associate Manager (Nursing - Dialysis): MSc Critical Care Nursing / MSc Nursing / BSc Nursing Junior Manager / Associate Manager (Lab Operations): MSc(MLT)/PGDMLT/BSc(MLT)/DMLT

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Manager / Associate Manager (Business Development - Diagnostic)
Junior Manager / Associate Manager (Cluster Operations - Dialysis)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HLL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HLL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the HLL Junior Manager / Associate Manager posts is 20 May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Manager / Associate Manager posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for the Junior Manager / Associate Manager positions in HLL Lifecare.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the HLL recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for HLL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 45,000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for HLL Lifecare jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for HLL Lifecare recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post and include degrees like MSc(MLT), MBA, MHA, BSc Nursing, and others as detailed in the eligibility criteria section.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for HLL Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the Important Links section of this article for your convenience.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are offered on a contract basis.
